offences.actDesc: DRIVER/CARRIER FAIL TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS FOR INSPEC
offences.text: -Photocopies of truck-tractor registration, cab card and insurance carried/produced. -Registration and cab card must be original government issued documents. -Insurance must be pink copy.
